TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Micronesia, title = Micronesia, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Micronesia} }

S.FORM: Micronesia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 6 55 N, 158 15 E na Tayangco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 702 sq km (maki' tay 191ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 702 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 104,719. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 25.50%, lhlahuy hya' ga 74.50%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 0%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Palikir. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 10 na tay ymagal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Peter M. Christian, aring ryax 11 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

Micronesia hya' ga cyux maki' tay 6 55 N, 158 15 E na Tayangco syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 702 sq km (maki' tay 191ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 702 sq km, kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 104,719. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 25.50%, lhlahuy hya' ga 74.50%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 0%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' spzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Palikir. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 10 na tay ymagal byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Peter M. Christian, aring ryax 11 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: mi ¶~ ®rones~…ēia ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj * ** n, *** ** e na tajaŇč ¶~ ®o s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē *** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj ***…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a *** s~…ēq km, kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a * s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a ***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a **.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a *%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē s~…ēpzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a palikir. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj jma…£al ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a peter m. ¶~ ®ńßris~…ētian, ariŇč rjax ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē ¶~ ®ia ***
